Notice Of Motion And Motion To Transfer And Consolidate Superior Court Case With Pending Small Claims Case
Off Calendar Aug-21-2018 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:
No appearance by any party or counsel.

There being no appearances, the Court adopted its tentative ruling as follows: Plaintiff Grass Roots Nonprofit Collective, Inc.'s motion to consolidate this case with the small claims case number 858229 is granted. Case 858229 is transferred out of the Small Claims Division. The two cases are consolidated for all purposes. This case is the lead case and all further filings will be in this case only. The August 28, 2018 trial date set in case 858229 is vacated. Defendant Julie Yoon is permitted to file a cross-complaint in this case no later than August 31, 2018 re-pleading her claim that she alleged in case 858229 and in doing so she is not limited to the jurisdictional maximum amount of Small Claims Court. There is no persuasive reason why Ms. Yoon should be required to file a separate motion to obtain such permission when there is no persuasive reason why she should not be given such permission. Order signed. (see order for full details)

Judge: Harold E. Kahn, Clerk: Jacqueline Alameda, Court Reporter: Maria Torreano, CSR 8600, 415.551.5868, Email: torreanom@aol.com. =(302/HEK)
